N Sum

0) Concept

0-2) Pattern

1) General form

1// c++
2//---------------------------------
3// 2 SUM general form (target = 0)
4//---------------------------------
5// (algorithm book (labu) p.329)
6vector<vector<int>> twoSumTarget(vector<int> & nums, int integer){
7    // need to sort nums first !
8    sort(nums.begin(), nums.end());
9
10    // init 2 pointers
11    int lo = 0, hi = nums.size() - 1;
12
13    vector<vector<int>> res;
14    
15    while (lo < hi){
16        int sum = nums[lo] + nums[hi];
17        int left = nums[lo], right = nums[hi];
18        if (sum < target){
19            while (lo < hi && nums[lo] == left) lo++;
20        }else if (sum > target){
21            while (lo < hi && nums[hi] == right) hi--;
22        }else{
23            res.push_back((left, right));
24            /** AVOID ADDING duplicated combinations */
25            while (lo < hi && nums[lo] == left) lo++;
26            while (lo < hi && nums[hi] == right) hi++;
27        }
28    }
29    return res;
30}

1// c++
2//---------------------------------
3// 3 SUM general form (target = N)
4//---------------------------------
5// (algorithm book (labu) p.331)
6vector<vector<int>> twoSumTarget(vector<int> & nums, int start, int target){ // difference
7
8    /** CHANGE left idx starts from "start", else are the same */
9    // init 2 pointers
10    int lo = start, hi = nums.size() - 1;
11
12    vector<vector<int>> res;
13    
14    while (lo < hi){
15        int sum = nums[lo] + nums[hi];
16        int left = nums[lo], right = nums[hi];
17        if (sum < target){
18            while (lo < hi && nums[lo] == left) lo++;
19        }else if (sum > target){
20            while (lo < hi && nums[hi] == right) hi--;
21        }else{
22            res.push_back((left, right));
23            /** AVOID ADDING duplicated combinations */
24            while (lo < hi && nums[lo] == left) lo++;
25            while (lo < hi && nums[hi] == right) hi++;
26        }
27    }
28    return res;
29}
30
31
32/** get all triplet combinations with sum = target */
33vector<vector<int>> threeSumTarget(vector<int> & nums, int target){
34    // need to sort nums first !
35    sort(nums.begin(), nums.end());
36
37    // init
38    int n = nums.size();
39    vector<vector<int>> res;
40
41    // looping for the 1st element in threeSum
42    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++){
43        // get twoSum from target - nums[i]
44        vector<vector<int>>
45        tuples = twoSumTarget(nums, i+1, target - nums[i]);
46
47        // if exists two sum fit requirement, add nums[i] is what we need
48        for (vector<int> & tuple: tuples){
49            tuple.push_back(nums[i]);
50            res.push_back(tuple);
51        }
52
53        /** neglect duplicated 1st element case, since duplocated combinations is NOT allowed */
54        while (i < n - 1 && nums[i] == nums[i+1]) i++;
55    }
56    return res;
57}

1// c++
2//---------------------------------
3// K SUM general form (target = N)
4//---------------------------------
5// (algorithm book (labu) p.334)
6
7vector<vector<int>> nSumTarget(vector<int> & nums, int n, int start, int target){
8
9    int sz = nums.size();
10    vector<vector<int>> res;
11
12    // NEED to be AT LEAST 2 sum, and array size >= n
13    if (n < 2 || sz < n) return res;
14
15    // 2 sum is base case
16    if (n == 2){
17        // 2 pointers op
18        int lo = start, hi = sz - 1;
19        while (lo < hi){
20            int sum = nums[lo] + nums[hi];
21            int left = nums[lo], int right = nums[hi];
22            if (sum < target){
23                while (lo < hi && nums[lo] == left) lo ++;
24            }else if (sum > target){
25                while (lo < hi && nums[hi] == right) hi --;
26            }else{
27                res.push_back((left, right));
28                /** AVOID ADDING duplicated combinations */
29                while (lo < hi && nums[lo] == left) lo++;
30                while (lo < hi && nums[hi] == right) hi++;
31            }
32        }
33    }else{
34        /** n > 2, recursive get (n-1) Sum result */
35        for (int i = start; i < sz; i++){
36            vector<vector<int>>;
37            sub = nSumTarget(nums, n-1, i+1, target - nums[i]);
38            for (vector<int> & arr : sub){
39                // (n-1) Sum plus nums[i] is nSum
40                arr.push_back(nums[i]);
41                res.push_back(arr);
42            }
43            while (i < sz-1 && nums[i] == nums[i+1]) i++;
44        }
45    }
46    return  res;
47}

1-1) Basic OP

2) LC Example

2-1) 2 Sum

1# LC 001
2class Solution(object):
3    def twoSum(self, nums, target):
4        lookup = {}
5        for i, num in enumerate(nums):
6            if target - num in lookup:
7                return [lookup[target - num], i]
8            lookup[num] = i
9        return [-1, -1]

2-1’) 2 Sum II

1# LC 167 Two Sum II - Input Array Is Sorted
2# NOTE : we can also use "2 sum" dict approach
3# V0
4# IDEA : TWO POINTERS
5#       -> l = 0, r = len(numbers) - 1
6class Solution(object):
7    def twoSum(self, numbers, target):
8        l = 0
9        ### NOTE this
10        r = len(numbers) - 1
11        res = []
12        while r > l:
13            #print ("l, r = {}, {}".format(l, r))
14            tmp = numbers[l] + numbers[r]
15            if tmp == target:
16                return [l+1, r+1]
17            ### NOTE this
18            elif tmp > target:
19                r -= 1
20            ### NOTE this
21            else:
22                l += 1
23        return [-1, -1]

2-2) 3 Sum

1# LC 015
2# V0
3# IDEA : for loop + 2 sum
4class Solution(object):
5    def threeSum(self, nums):
6        # edge case
7        if not nums or len(nums) < 3:
8            return []
9        if len(nums) == 3:
10            return [nums] if sum(nums) == 0 else []
11        if nums.count(0) == len(nums):
12            return [[0,0,0]]
13        res = []
14        nums.sort()
15        # for loop
16        for i in range(len(nums)):
17            cur = nums[i]
18            # 2 sum
19            d = {}
20            """
21            NOTE !!!
22             -> we don't need below implementation (will cause TLE)
23
24                #_nums = nums[:i] + nums[i+1:]
25                #for j, x in enumerate(_nums):
26
27             -> this one is enough : for j, x in enumerate(nums[i+1:])
28            """
29            for j, x in enumerate(nums[i+1:]):
30                # cur + x + y = 0
31                # -> y = -x - cur
32                if -x-cur in d:
33                    tmp = [cur, x, -x-cur]
34                    tmp.sort()
35                    if tmp not in res:
36                        res.append(tmp)
37                    #res.append([cur, x, -x-cur])
38                else:
39                    d[x] = j
40        return res
41
42# V0
43# IDEA : 2 SUM -> 3 SUM
44class Solution(object):
45    def threeSum(self, nums):
46        if not nums or len(nums) <= 2:
47            return []
48        res = []
49        # optimize, not necessary
50        nums.sort()
51        # loop over i
52        for i in range(len(nums)):
53            """
54            2 sum
55            """
56            d = {}
57            """
58            NOTE !!! here we loop over range(i+1, len(nums))
59            #   -> since we need non duplicated results
60            """
61            for j in range(i+1, len(nums)):
62                """
63                NOTE : nums[i] + nums[j] + nums[k] = 0
64                #    -> so - (nums[i] + nums[j]) = nums[k]
65                #    -> and we are trying to find if such k already in the dict
66                """
67                if -(nums[i] + nums[j]) in d:
68                    tmp = [nums[i]] + [nums[j], -(nums[i]+nums[j])]
69                    tmp.sort()
70                    if tmp not in res:
71                        res.append(tmp)
72                else:
73                    d[nums[j]] = j
74        return res
75
76# V0'
77# IDEA : 2 SUM -> 3 SUM
78class Solution(object):
79    def threeSum(self, nums):
80        res = []
81        if not nums or len(nums) <= 2:
82            return res
83        # this sort may not be necessary
84        nums.sort()
85        for i in range(len(nums)):
86            # NOTE : set target = -nums[i]
87            t = -nums[i]
88            d = {}
89            ### NOTE : we NEED tp loop from idx = i+1 to len(nums)
90            for j in range(i+1, len(nums)):
91                if  (-nums[j] + t) in d:
92                        tmp = [ nums[i], nums[j], -nums[j] + t ]
93                        tmp.sort()
94                        # note :  this trick to not append duplicated ans
95                        if tmp not in res:
96                            res.append(tmp)
97                d[nums[j]] = j
98        return res

2-3) 4 Sum

1# LC 018
2# V0 
3class Solution(object):
4    def fourSum(self, nums, target):
5        resultList = []
6        nums.sort()
7        for num1 in range(0, len(nums)-3):
8            for num2 in range(num1 + 1, len(nums)-2):
9                num3 = num2 + 1
10                num4 = len(nums) -1
11                while num3 != num4:
12                    summer = nums[num1] + nums[num2] + nums[num3] + nums[num4]
13                    if summer == target:
14                        list_temp = [nums[num1],nums[num2],nums[num3],nums[num4]]
15                        if list_temp not in resultList:
16                            resultList.append(list_temp)
17                        num3 += 1
18                    elif summer > target:
19                        num4 -= 1
20                    else:
21                        num3 += 1
22        return resultList

2-4) Two Sum Less Than K

1# LC 1099 Two Sum Less Than K
2# V1
3# https://goodtecher.com/leetcode-1099-two-sum-less-than-k/
4class Solution:
5    def twoSumLessThanK(self, nums, k):    
6        nums = sorted(nums)
7        i = 0
8        j = len(nums) - 1
9      
10        max_sum = -1
11        
12        while i < j:
13            if nums[i] + nums[j] >= k:
14                j -= 1
15            else:
16                max_sum = max(max_sum, nums[i] + nums[j])
17                i += 1      
18        return max_sum
19
20# V1'
21# https://blog.51cto.com/u_15344287/3647641
22class Solution:
23    def twoSumLessThanK(self, nums: List[int], k: int) -> int:
24        nums.sort()
25        ans = -1
26        for i1 in range(len(nums)):
27            n1 = nums[i1]
28            i2 = bisect.bisect_left(nums, k - nums[i1], lo=i1 + 1) - 1
29            n2 = nums[i2]
30            if i2 > i1:
31                ans = max(ans, n1 + n2)
32        return ans
